subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of Abdul-Baha! The glad-tidings of your attraction and enkindlement, ecstasy and exhilaration, hath reached us before and a special Tablet
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء از پیش خبر جذب و وله و وجد و طرب شما رسید و مکتوبی مخصوص ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @universal peace; world unity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
